title: platostoma annamense
intro: Platostoma annamense is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of Vietnam and Laos. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Platostoma annamense is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create pharmaceutical products.
